title: PSEB 8th Class Result 2026

detail.title: PSEB 8th Class Result 2026
detail.short_info: PSEB 8th Class Result 2026 declared on April 10, 2026. Check Punjab Board Class 8 result online at pseb.ac.in with roll number, download marksheet, view toppers list, pass percentage, and complete step-by-step guide.

content.text: PSEB 8th Class Result 2026 has been officially declared by the Punjab School Education Board (PSEB) on April 10, 2026. Students can now check their Punjab Board Class 8 result online at pseb.ac.in using their roll number.

PSEB 8th Class Result 2026 is now available online for all students who appeared in the Punjab Board Middle Examination (Class 8) conducted in February 2026. The Punjab School Education Board (PSEB), Mohali, officially released the results on April 10, 2026. Over 2.62 lakh students can now check their scorecards, subject-wise marks, and qualifying status.
Direct Link for PSEB 8th Class Result 2026: Click Here

rows: PSEB 8th Class Result 2026 / Middle Examination Result 2026

sections.heading: Key Highlights of Punjab Board 8th Result 2026
How to Check PSEB 8th Class Result 2026 Online

items: Visit the official PSEB website: pseb.ac.in
Click on the “Results” section or “Middle Examination Result 2026”.
Enter your Roll Number and captcha code.
Click Submit to view your scorecard.
Download and print the provisional marksheet.
SMS: Type PB8 Roll Number and send to 5676750
